title: Dependabot can't parse your go.mod
body:
Dependabot couldn't parse the go.mod found at `/go.mod`.

The error Dependabot encountered was:

```
go: github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.1.0 requires
	github.com/mtrmac/gpgme@v0.0.0-20170102180018-b2432428689c: invalid version: unknown revision b2432428689c
```

[View the update logs](https://app.dependabot.com/accounts/containers/update-logs/21204439).

comments.body: @mtrmac, I assume this will be fixed once we update c/image?
See https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/2096#issuecomment-577094933, that should be working now. I’m not sure whether Dependabot needs a command to retry.
